## Summary

Describe the change and user-visible behavior.

## Tests

List exact commands run. Include `ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure` where relevant.

## Wayland Verification

Describe compositor, scaling, fullscreen, and GPU checks for UI or playback changes.

## Security Impact

Describe effects on credentials, WebEngine, external links, command execution, and logging.

## Compatibility

Note any compatibility, packaging, or migration impact.

## Screenshots

Attach screenshots or recordings for UI changes.
